text.tspan: Consistent core: ZooKeeper (3-5 nodes)
u2022 holds broker membership
u2022 holds partitionu2192leader mapping
u2022 holds controller election
Data layer: 100s of Kafka brokers
u2022 partition replication is per-partition (not via ZK)
u2022 brokers consult ZK only on metadata events
KRaft (Kafka 3.3+) replaced ZK with embedded Raft u2014
still the same pattern.
Consistent core: Chubby / ZooKeeper (5 nodes)
u2022 stores tablet u2192 server assignment
u2022 master election
Data layer: thousands of tablet servers
u2022 actually serve data, sometimes consult ZK for tablet info
u2022 client caches tablet u2192 server map; refreshes on miss
Consistent core: etcd (3-5 nodes)
u2022 stores cluster state: pods, services, configmaps, secrets
u2022 controller election
Data layer: thousands of worker nodes (kubelet)
u2022 actually run containers, consult API server (u2192 etcd) for assignments
u2022 watch API server for changes
Consistent core: 'meta ranges' (the first few Raft groups
storing the descriptor of all other ranges)

g.text: Data layer: thousands of per-range Raft groups
Consistent core: ZooKeeper for resource/partition assignment
Data layer: Espresso, Pinot, Voldemort, others
